3.description: Get high risk quick-clay hazard areas

candidates.database_description: Quick clay hazard zone data, including hazard classes, consequence classes, and risk classes for areas with potential large quick-clay landslides.
Cadastral parcel data from Matrikkelen, including parcel polygons, parcel identifiers, municipality attributes, parcel area, and metadata for linking parcels to cadastral property units.
Snow avalanche susceptibility data showing areas that may be exposed to snow avalanche hazard. Useful for spatial overlay with buildings and parcels in hazard analysis.

candidates.database_description: Quick clay hazard zone data, including hazard classes, consequence classes, and risk classes for areas with potential large quick-clay landslides.
Cadastral parcel data from Matrikkelen, including parcel polygons, parcel identifiers, municipality attributes, parcel area, and metadata for linking parcels to cadastral property units.
Snow avalanche susceptibility data showing areas that may be exposed to snow avalanche hazard. Useful for spatial overlay with buildings and parcels in hazard analysis.

tools.result: [{"database": "matrikkelenbygning", "description": "Building and cadastral building data, including building identifiers, municipality attributes, status fields, and building representation points."}, {"database": "flomaktsomrader", "description": "Flood hazard and flood susceptibility spatial data, including hazard polygons and related flood-risk layers."}, {"database": "flomsoner", "description": "Flood zone spatial data, including flood hazard polygons and flood zone identifiers."}, {"database": "kvikkleire", "description": "Quick clay hazard data and related landslide-risk spatial layers."}, {"database": "snoskredaktsomhetskart", "description": "Snow avalanche susceptibility data and related hazard zones."}, {"database": "matrikkeleneiendomskartteig", "description": "Property parcel data with parcel identifiers, municipality attributes, parcel polygons, and cadastral parcel metadata."}, {"database": "aktsomhetskart_jord_flomskred", "description": "Soil and flood landslide susceptibility data and related hazard layers."}, {"database": "kommuner", "description": "Municipality boundary and municipality reference data, including official municipality names, municipality numbers, and municipality polygons."}, {"database": "fylker", "description": "County boundary and county reference data, including official county names, county numbers, and county polygons."}, {"database": "statistiskrutenett1km", "description": "Regular 1 km statistical grid for spatial aggregation and grid-based analysis independent of municipality boundaries."}, {"database": "arealressurskart_ar50", "description": "AR50 land resource data with area types, agriculture classes, and forest productivity information."}, {"database": "stormflohavniva", "description": ""}]
